extension.description: Explore and edit Microsoft Access databases (.accdb/.mdb) from VS Code via MCP-Access.
viewsContainer.title: Access
view.databases.name: Databases
configuration.title: Access Explorer
command.addConnection.title: Access: Add Connection
command.removeConnection.title: Access: Remove Connection
command.refresh.title: Access: Refresh
command.reconnect.title: Access: Reconnect MCP
command.restartProcesses.title: Access: Restart Access Processes
command.showMcpRuntime.title: Access: Show MCP Runtime
command.searchObjects.title: Access: Search Objects
command.showDetails.title: Access: Show Object Details
command.runSqlQuery.title: Access: Run SQL Query
command.executeActiveSql.title: Access: Execute Active SQL
command.openSqlEditor.title: Access: New SQL Query
command.pickSqlConnection.title: Access: Select SQL Connection
command.saveCodeToAccess.title: Access: Save Code to Access
command.compileVba.title: Access: Compile VBA
command.compactRepair.title: Access: Compact & Repair
config.pythonCommand.description: Python command used to start MCP-Access (e.g. python or py).
config.serverScriptPath.description: Absolute path to access_mcp_server.py from MCP-Access.
config.toolPrefix.description: Tool prefix used by your MCP server (e.g. access or mcp_access_access).
config.requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for general MCP calls.
config.sqlQueryTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for SQL query execution (execute_sql). Default: 600000 (10 min).
config.autoEnableVbaTrust.description: Automatically set AccessVBOM=1 in Access Trust Center via registry at startup. Keep disabled if you do not want the extension to change Trust Center settings.
config.preserveTrustedLocations.descript: Create a snapshot of Access Trusted Locations before MCP session work and restore it automatically on disconnect.
